knowledge.html:
Tìm Lỗi Sai (Error Finding)

Chọn từ/cụm từ gạch chân có lỗi sai trong câu. Các lỗi thường gặp:

  • Chia động từ (subject-verb agreement, tense)
  • Từ loại (noun/verb/adj/adv dùng sai vị trí)
  • Giới từ
  • Mạo từ
  • Cấu trúc ngữ pháp

exercises.wrongSentence: People are worry about COVID-19 Pandemic, which has caused huge human tolls.
exercises.correctSentence: People are worried about COVID-19 Pandemic, which has caused huge human tolls.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: worry → worried | Từ loại: Sau 'are' cần tính từ 'worried' (quá khứ phân từ), không phải động từ 'worry'. Các từ khác: are (đúng), has caused (đúng), huge (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: Mr. Will is going to collect all the bags and taken them to the garbage dump.
exercises.correctSentence: Mr. Will is going to collect all the bags and take them to the garbage dump.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: taken → take | Cấu trúc: Sau 'and' (song song với 'collect') cần động từ nguyên mẫu 'take', không phải quá khứ phân từ 'taken'. Các từ khác: is going to collect (đúng), all the bags (đúng), them (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: The children laughed happy when they saw the monkeys eating bananas.
exercises.correctSentence: The children laughed happily when they saw the monkeys eating bananas.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: happy → happily | Từ loại: Cần trạng từ 'happily' để bổ nghĩa động từ 'laughed', không phải tính từ 'happy'. Các từ khác: The children (đúng), laughed (đúng), when they saw (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: I asked him how far was it to the station if I went there by taxi.
exercises.correctSentence: I asked him how far it was to the station if I went there by taxi.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: was it → it was | Cấu trúc: Trong câu tường thuật, dùng trật tự tính từ 'it was', không phải trật tự câu hỏi 'was it'. Các từ khác: I asked him (đúng), how far (đúng), to the station (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: Although he was tired, but he still went to work yesterday.
exercises.correctSentence: Although he was tired, he still went to work yesterday.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: but → (bỏ) | Cấu trúc: 'Although' và 'but' không dùng cùng nhau, 'although' đã biểu đạt nghĩa đối lập rồi. Các từ khác: Although he was tired (đúng), he still went (đúng), to work yesterday (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: The artist tried stimulate interest in painting by taking his students to the museums.
exercises.correctSentence: The artist tried to stimulate interest in painting by taking his students to the museums.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: stimulate → to stimulate | Cấu trúc: 'Try + động từ có to' biểu đạt cố gắng làm điều gì, cần 'to stimulate' (động từ có to). Các từ khác: The artist tried (đúng), interest in painting (đúng), by taking his students (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: Mumps are a very common disease, which usually affects children.
exercises.correctSentence: Mumps is a very common disease, which usually affects children.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: are → is | Chia động từ: 'Mumps' là tên bệnh, tuy có 's' nhưng được coi là danh từ số ít, dùng 'is', không phải 'are'. Các từ khác: Mumps (đúng), a very common disease (đúng), which usually affects (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: Before she moved here, Arlene had been president of the organization since four years.
exercises.correctSentence: Before she moved here, Arlene had been president of the organization for four years.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: since → for | Giới từ: 'Four years' là thời lượng, dùng 'for', không phải 'since' (cần một thời điểm cụ thể). Các từ khác: Before she moved here (đúng), Arlene had been president (đúng), of the organization (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: I really wish I have a laptop to replace this old-fashioned computer.
exercises.correctSentence: I really wish I had a laptop to replace this old-fashioned computer.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: have → had | Cấu trúc: 'Wish + quá khứ đơn' cho ước mong không thực hiện được ở hiện tại, cần 'had' không phải 'have'. Các từ khác: I really wish (đúng), a laptop (đúng), to replace (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: One of the most serious problem now is the spread of COVID-19.
exercises.correctSentence: One of the most serious problems now is the spread of COVID-19.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: problem → problems | Từ loại: Sau 'one of the most' cần danh từ số nhiều 'problems', không phải số ít. Các từ khác: One of the most (đúng), serious (đúng), now is the spread (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: The bike he has just bought is more expensive as mine.
exercises.correctSentence: The bike he has just bought is more expensive than mine.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: as → than | So sánh: Cấu trúc so sánh hơn là 'more expensive than', không phải 'as'. Các từ khác: The bike he has just bought (đúng), is more expensive (đúng), mine (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: When I was a student, I loved reading and fill my free time with adventure novels.
exercises.correctSentence: When I was a student, I loved reading and filling my free time with adventure novels.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: fill → filling | Cấu trúc: Sau 'loved' cần cấu trúc song song, 'reading and filling' đều là danh động từ. Các từ khác: When I was a student (đúng), I loved reading (đúng), my free time (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: When her doll was lost, she cried very hardly for half an hour.
exercises.correctSentence: When her doll was lost, she cried very hard for half an hour.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: hardly → hard | Từ loại: 'Hard' là trạng từ đúng nghĩa 'nỗ lực', 'hardly' có nghĩa 'gần như không'. Các từ khác: When her doll was lost (đúng), she cried (đúng), for half an hour (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: You mustn't do any cooking as I've already prepared something.
exercises.correctSentence: You needn't do any cooking as I've already prepared something.
acceptedCorrectSentences: You needn't do any cooking as I've already prepared something.
You don't need to do any cooking as I've already prepared something.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: mustn't → needn't | Từ loại: 'Mustn't' có nghĩa 'cấm', 'needn't' có nghĩa 'không cần thiết'. Ở đây ý nói không cần nấu ăn vì đã chuẩn bị rồi, nên dùng 'needn't'. Các từ khác: You (đúng), do any cooking (đúng), as I've already prepared (đúng).

exercises.wrongSentence: My sister has so many homeworks to do that she has no time to go out.
exercises.correctSentence: My sister has so much homework to do that she has no time to go out.
exercises.explanation: Lỗi: many homeworks → much homework | Từ loại: 'Homework' là danh từ không đếm được, dùng 'much homework' không phải 'many homeworks'. Các từ khác: My sister has (đúng), so much (đúng), to do (đúng).
